title: Dragite crystal
content:
{{Top|canon=Dragite gem}}
{{Youmay|the lightsaber crystal|[[Dragite (Jedi)|Dragite]], the [[Iron Knight]]}}
[[File:Dragite.jpg|thumb|250px|A Dragite crystal.]]
'''Dragite crystals''' were found on [[M'haeli/Legends|M'haeli]], in the [[D'olop Mountain Range]].

The [[Crystal/Legends|crystals]] were highly valued as a power source and were sometimes used to focus [[Lightsaber/Legends|lightsabers]].<ref name="KOTOR">''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic II: The Sith Lords]]''</ref> The beam they created resonated loudly when it struck, inflicting a minor amount of sonic damage.
